title: sparkle.shift.dropped
description: Emitted when a manager approves a shift drop, reassigning it to a volunteer.

proposalId.description: UUID of the ShiftTradeProposal (type=drop) that was approved.

originalEmployeeId.description: UUID of the employee who offered to drop the shift.

pickupEmployeeId.description: UUID of the employee who picked up the shift, or null if unassigned.
